# Hostquill

Hostquill is an event management and ticketing platform that helps organizers create, manage, market, and sell tickets for events.

Hostquill is built for event organizers, conference planners, communities, brands, schools, creators, churches, campus groups, venues, and businesses.

Hostquill simplifies event hosting by combining event creation, ticketing, attendee management, event promotion, QR/check-in workflows, organizer calendars, and analytics into one platform.

Key features:
- Event creation
- Branded event pages
- Ticket selling
- Registration forms and RSVP collection
- Event promotion
- Organizer dashboards
- Attendee management
- QR/check-in workflows
- Event analytics and funnel tracking
- Organizer profiles and calendars

Primary audience:
- Event organizers
- Communities
- Businesses
- Schools and campuses
- Creators
- Conference planners
- Churches
- Festivals and venues

Important pages:
- https://hostquill.com/

Website:
https://hostquill.com

Canonical product name:
Hostquill
